'''karuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyelolithotomy|pyelolithotomy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-r-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyelolithotomy|pyelolithotomy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| karuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || kærivith || kærivij || kærivish || kærivi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || karuruvuth || karuruvuj || karuruvush || karuruvu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || karuvuth || karuvuj || karuvush || karuvu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || karufvufth || karufvufj || karufvufsh || karufvuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || karuvuthu || karuvuju || karuvushu || karuvuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || karuvuth || karuvuj || karuvush || karuvu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || karuvuthul || karuvujul || karuvushul || karuvukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || karuvuuthuthu || karuvuujuju || karuvuushushu || karuvuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || karuvuthun || karuvujun || karuvushun || karuvukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || karuvuthuoro || karuvujuoro || karuvushuoro || karuvukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
